basic_details.job_title: Bamra Wildlife Division DMU Level Project Accountant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bamra Wildlife Division has published the DMU Level Project Accountant Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 05 of 2026-27. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 DMU Level Project Accountant position. Candidates holding a B.Com degree with PGDCA, Tally Software knowledge, and a minimum of 5 years of relevant experience are eligible to participate in the recruitment process. Applications should be submitted by 27 July 2026, and the walk-in interview is scheduled for 28 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Com with PGDCA & Tally Software and Minimum 5 years of experience
qualification.details: B.Com with PGDCA & Tally Software Minimum 5 years of experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bamra Wildlife Division DMU Level Project Accountant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.odishaforest.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bamra Wildlife Division DMU Level Project Accountant Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Bamra Wildlife Division DMU Level Project Accountant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.odishaforest.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bamra Wildlife Division DMU Level Project Accountant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DMU Level Project Accountant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form is 27th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Com degree along with a PGDCA and proficiency in Tally Software. A minimum of 5 years of relevant experience is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the DMU Level Project Accountant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month for this contractual role.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the DMU Level Project Accountant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are expected to attend the interview on the specified date.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at Bamra Wildlife Division, Bamra, Odisha, Pin code: 768221. Specific timings will be mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the Bamra Wildlife Division.

faq.question: Q8. How can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Bamra Wildlife Division, which is www.odishaforest.in. Ensure you download the form from the correct source.

faq.question: Q9. What documents do I need to submit with the application?
faq.answer: You will need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as a photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational/experience certificates as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of DMU Level Project Accountant is 05 of 2026-27.
